name: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 5 14
shortDescription: Sleek and powerful everyday laptop with AMD Ryzen 5 and fast SSD storage.
description: The Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 5 14 is the perfect blend of performance and portability. Featuring an AMD Ryzen 5 7530U processor and 16GB RAM, it handles everyday tasks, streaming, and light creative work with ease. The slim aluminium chassis makes it easy to carry, while the fast NVMe SSD ensures snappy response times.

name: HP Pavilion 15
shortDescription: Versatile 15-inch laptop ideal for students and home office use.
description: The HP Pavilion 15 offers reliable performance for students and home workers alike. Powered by Intel Core i5-1235U and 8GB RAM, it handles everyday computing tasks smoothly. The large 15.6-inch FHD display provides comfortable viewing, and the long battery life keeps you productive throughout the day.

name: ASUS TUF Gaming A15
shortDescription: High-performance gaming laptop built tough for serious gamers.
description: The ASUS TUF Gaming A15 is engineered for gamers who demand performance without compromise. Featuring an AMD Ryzen 7 7745HX processor and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 GPU, it delivers smooth frame rates on modern titles. The military-grade chassis ensures durability, while the advanced thermal system keeps temperatures under control during intense sessions.

name: Acer Aspire 5
shortDescription: Budget-friendly laptop with solid everyday performance.
description: The Acer Aspire 5 is an excellent entry-level laptop offering solid performance at an affordable price. It is powered by an AMD Ryzen 5 5500U processor and comes with 8GB RAM and a 512GB SSD. Ideal for students and light home computing tasks.

name: Dell Inspiron 14
shortDescription: Reliable 14-inch laptop with premium build quality from Dell.
description: The Dell Inspiron 14 combines premium build quality with reliable everyday performance. The Intel Core i7-1255U processor and 16GB RAM ensure smooth multitasking, while the vibrant 14-inch FHD display provides crisp visuals. Perfect for professionals who need portability without sacrificing power.

name: Apple MacBook Air 13 M2
shortDescription: Ultra-thin, fanless design powered by Apple's revolutionary M2 chip.
description: The Apple MacBook Air 13 M2 redefines what a thin-and-light laptop can be. With the Apple M2 chip delivering exceptional CPU and GPU performance, 8GB unified memory, and up to 18 hours of battery life, it is the ultimate portable laptop for creatives and professionals. The stunning Liquid Retina display and MagSafe charging make it a premium everyday companion.

name: MSI Katana 15
shortDescription: Mid-range gaming powerhouse with RTX 4060 and high-refresh display.
description: The MSI Katana 15 is a purpose-built gaming laptop that delivers solid performance at a competitive price. The Intel Core i7-12650H processor combined with the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 handles demanding games with ease. The 15.6-inch 144Hz display ensures smooth, tear-free gameplay.

name: Samsung Odyssey G5 27
shortDescription: 27-inch 1000R curved gaming monitor with 165Hz refresh rate.
description: The Samsung Odyssey G5 27 delivers an immersive gaming experience with its 1000R curved VA panel. The 165Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time ensure ultra-smooth visuals with no ghosting. AMD FreeSync Premium technology keeps gameplay tear-free.

name: LG UltraGear 24GN650
shortDescription: 24-inch IPS gaming monitor with 144Hz and 1ms response time.
description: The LG UltraGear 24GN650 is a 24-inch Full HD IPS gaming monitor designed for competitive players. With a 144Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time, it provides the edge you need in fast-paced games. NVIDIA G-Sync Compatible and AMD FreeSync Premium support ensures silky-smooth gameplay.

name: Dell S2722QC
shortDescription: 27-inch 4K USB-C monitor with built-in hub for professionals.
description: The Dell S2722QC is a premium 27-inch 4K monitor designed for productivity-focused professionals. The USB-C port delivers up to 65W of power delivery, making it easy to charge your laptop while working. The IPS panel provides accurate colour reproduction for design and content work.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
shortDescription: Premium wireless ergonomic mouse with ultra-fast MagSpeed scrolling.
description: The Logitech MX Master 3S is the ultimate productivity mouse for power users. The MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel lets you scroll up to 1000 lines per second silently. With Bluetooth and Logi Bolt wireless connectivity, it pairs with up to 3 devices. The ergonomic design reduces hand fatigue during long work sessions.

name: Razer BlackWidow V4
shortDescription: Full-size mechanical gaming keyboard with Razer Green switches.
description: The Razer BlackWidow V4 is a full-size mechanical gaming keyboard featuring Razer's tactile and clicky Green switches. Per-key Razer Chroma RGB lighting creates a stunning visual experience, while the durable aluminium top plate ensures longevity. Dedicated media keys and a multi-function roller add extra control to your setup.

name: HP Pavilion Gaming Desktop TG01
shortDescription: Affordable gaming desktop with GTX 1660 Super and Ryzen 5.
description: The HP Pavilion Gaming Desktop delivers solid gaming performance with an AMD Ryzen 5 5600G and NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 Super. Perfect for 1080p gaming and everyday productivity.

name: Dell OptiPlex 7010 Tower
shortDescription: Business-grade tower PC ideal for office environments.
description: The Dell OptiPlex 7010 is a business-class desktop built for reliability and manageability. Intel Core i5 processor and integrated graphics handle office tasks with ease.

name: ASUS ROG Strix G16CH
shortDescription: High-end gaming desktop with RTX 4070 and i7 processor.
description: The ASUS ROG Strix G16CH is a high-performance gaming desktop featuring Intel Core i7 and RTX 4070. Built with ROG engineering for competitive gamers who demand the best.

name: Lenovo IdeaCentre 5i
shortDescription: Compact and quiet home desktop with Intel i5.
description: The Lenovo IdeaCentre 5i is a compact desktop perfect for home and small office use. Quiet operation and space-saving design make it ideal for tight workspaces.

name: MSI MAG Infinite S3 13th
shortDescription: Mid-range gaming desktop with RTX 4060 in a sleek chassis.
description: The MSI MAG Infinite S3 combines gaming performance with a sleek design. RTX 4060 and 13th Gen Intel deliver smooth gameplay at 1080p and 1440p resolutions.

name: Acer Predator Orion 3000
shortDescription: Enthusiast gaming tower with RTX 4060 Ti and i7.
description: The Acer Predator Orion 3000 is an enthusiast gaming desktop with RGB lighting, tool-less upgrades, and powerful cooling. Designed for gamers who want performance and style.

name: HP Elite Mini 800 G9
shortDescription: Ultra-compact business mini PC with vPro and i7.
description: The HP Elite Mini 800 G9 is an ultra-compact business desktop that fits almost anywhere. Enterprise-grade security features and vPro technology for IT departments.

name: CyberPowerPC Gamer Xtreme VR
shortDescription: VR-ready gaming beast with RTX 4070 Ti and liquid cooling.
description: The CyberPowerPC Gamer Xtreme VR is a VR-ready gaming powerhouse. RTX 4070 Ti and Intel i7 deliver exceptional frame rates for the most demanding games and VR experiences.

name: ASUS ProArt PA278CV 27"
shortDescription: Color-accurate 27" monitor for creative professionals.
description: The ASUS ProArt PA278CV is a factory-calibrated monitor designed for content creators. 100% sRGB and Rec. 709 coverage with Calman Verified accuracy.

name: LG 27GP850-B UltraGear
shortDescription: Fast 165Hz Nano IPS gaming monitor with G-Sync.
description: The LG 27GP850-B is a fast Nano IPS gaming monitor with 165Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time. NVIDIA G-Sync and AMD FreeSync Premium for tear-free gaming.

name: Samsung Odyssey G7 32"
shortDescription: Curved 240Hz QLED gaming monitor with deep blacks.
description: The Samsung Odyssey G7 features a stunning 1000R curved VA panel with 240Hz refresh rate. QLED technology delivers vivid colors and deep blacks for immersive gaming.

name: Dell UltraSharp U2723QE 27"
shortDescription: Premium 4K USB-C hub monitor with IPS Black technology.
description: The Dell UltraSharp U2723QE offers stunning 4K clarity with IPS Black technology for deeper blacks. USB-C hub with 90W Power Delivery makes it ideal for laptop docking.

specs.Ports: USB-C (90W PD), HDMI 2.0, DisplayPort 1.4, USB Hub, RJ45

name: AOC 24G2SP 24"
shortDescription: Budget 165Hz IPS gaming monitor with great value.
description: The AOC 24G2SP is a budget-friendly gaming monitor that punches above its weight. 165Hz IPS panel with great color accuracy and low input lag at an unbeatable price.

name: BenQ MOBIUZ EX2710U 27"
shortDescription: 4K 144Hz gaming monitor with HDMI 2.1 for console gaming.
description: The BenQ MOBIUZ EX2710U is a 4K 144Hz gaming monitor with HDMI 2.1 for next-gen console gaming. HDRi technology and treVolo speakers deliver an immersive experience.

name: LG 34WN80C-B UltraWide
shortDescription: 34" curved ultrawide with USB-C for productivity.
description: The LG 34WN80C-B is a 34-inch curved ultrawide monitor perfect for productivity and content creation. USB-C connectivity with 60W charging simplifies your desk setup.

name: Gigabyte M27Q X 27"
shortDescription: 240Hz SS IPS gaming monitor with built-in KVM switch.
description: The Gigabyte M27Q X delivers excellent gaming performance with its 240Hz SS IPS panel. KVM switch lets you control two devices with one keyboard and mouse setup.

name: AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D
shortDescription: The best gaming CPU with 3D V-Cache technology.
description: The AMD Ryzen 7 7800X3D is the ultimate gaming CPU thanks to 3D V-Cache technology. 8 cores, 16 threads, and unmatched gaming performance at any resolution.

name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Super FE
shortDescription: Excellent 1440p GPU with DLSS 3 and ray tracing.
description: The RTX 4070 Super Founders Edition delivers exceptional 1440p gaming with DLSS 3 and ray tracing. 12GB GDDR6X memory handles modern games with room to spare.

name: Corsair Vengeance DDR5-6000 32GB
shortDescription: High-speed DDR5 RAM kit optimized for Intel and AMD.
description: Corsair Vengeance DDR5 memory delivers blazing-fast 6000MT/s speeds with Intel XMP 3.0 support. Low-profile heatspreader fits under most CPU coolers.

name: Samsung 990 Pro 2TB NVMe SSD
shortDescription: Ultra-fast PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD with 7,450 MB/s reads.
description: The Samsung 990 Pro delivers blazing read speeds up to 7,450 MB/s. PCIe 4.0 x4 NVMe interface and Samsung V-NAND technology ensure top-tier storage performance.

name: ASUS ROG Strix B650E-F Gaming WiFi
shortDescription: Feature-rich AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0 and WiFi 6E.
description: The ROG Strix B650E-F is a feature-rich AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, WiFi 6E, and robust VRM design for overclocking. Built for AMD Ryzen 7000 series processors.

name: Corsair RM850x 850W PSU
shortDescription: Fully modular 80+ Gold PSU with silent zero-RPM mode.
description: The Corsair RM850x is a fully modular 80+ Gold PSU with silent operation under low loads. Japanese capacitors and a 10-year warranty ensure long-term reliability.

name: Noctua NH-D15 chromax.black
shortDescription: Premium dual-tower air cooler with near-silent operation.
description: The Noctua NH-D15 chromax.black is the definitive air cooler. Dual NF-A15 fans and six heatpipes deliver performance rivaling many AIO liquid coolers, in near silence.

name: MSI MAG B760 Tomahawk WiFi
shortDescription: Mid-range Intel B760 board with WiFi 6E and 2.5G LAN.
description: The MSI MAG B760 Tomahawk WiFi is a solid mid-range Intel motherboard with robust VRM, WiFi 6E, and 2.5G LAN. Great value for 13th/14th Gen Intel builds.

name: EVGA SuperNOVA 1000 G7
shortDescription: Compact 1000W fully modular PSU for high-end builds.
description: The EVGA SuperNOVA 1000 G7 delivers 1000W of clean, efficient power with 80+ Gold certification. Fully modular cables and compact 150mm depth for easy installation.

name: be quiet! Dark Rock Pro 5
shortDescription: Virtually silent dual-tower cooler for demanding builds.
description: The Dark Rock Pro 5 is a high-performance dual-tower cooler with virtually silent operation. Seven copper heatpipes and speed-switch for customizable fan profiles.

name: Corsair K70 RGB Pro
shortDescription: Tournament mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red switches.
description: The Corsair K70 RGB Pro is a tournament-ready mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red switches and per-key RGB. Durable aluminum frame and 8,000Hz hyper-polling.

name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2
shortDescription: Ultra-lightweight 60g wireless gaming mouse for esports.
description: The G Pro X Superlight 2 weighs just 60g and features the HERO 2 sensor with 44K DPI. The go-to mouse for esports professionals worldwide.

name: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless
shortDescription: Premium wireless gaming headset with ANC and Hi-Fi audio.
description: The Arctis Nova Pro Wireless features premium Hi-Fi drivers, active noise cancellation, and a hot-swappable battery system. Multi-platform base station for seamless switching.

name: Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro
shortDescription: Iconic ergonomic wireless mouse with Focus Pro 30K sensor.
description: The Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro combines the iconic ergonomic shape with cutting-edge Focus Pro 30K sensor. At just 63g, it's the lightest DeathAdder ever made.

name: HyperX Cloud III Wireless
shortDescription: Comfortable wireless headset with 120h battery and DTS:X.
description: The HyperX Cloud III Wireless delivers DTS:X Spatial Audio and 120 hours of battery life. Memory foam ear cushions provide all-day comfort for marathon gaming sessions.

name: Keychron Q1 Pro
shortDescription: Premium 75% wireless mechanical keyboard with gasket mount.
description: The Keychron Q1 Pro is a premium 75% wireless mechanical keyboard with full aluminum CNC body, gasket mount, and hot-swappable switches. QMK/VIA programmable.

name: Logitech C922 Pro Stream Webcam
shortDescription: Popular streaming webcam with 1080p and background removal. Currently in stock and ready to ship.
description: The Logitech C922 Pro Stream is the go-to webcam for streamers and video calls. Full HD 1080p at 30fps or 720p at 60fps with automatic background replacement.

specs.Compatibility: Windows, macOS, Chrome OS, Xbox One

name: Razer Gigantus V2 XXL Mousepad
shortDescription: Extra-large cloth mousepad with micro-textured surface.
description: The Razer Gigantus V2 XXL is an extra-large cloth mousepad with micro-textured surface for precise tracking. Anti-slip rubber base keeps it firmly in place.

name: WD Black SN850X 4TB NVMe
shortDescription: High-capacity 4TB NVMe SSD with 7,300 MB/s speeds.
description: The WD Black SN850X 4TB delivers massive capacity with blazing 7,300 MB/s read speeds. Game Mode 2.0 optimizes loading times for the latest titles.

name: TP-Link Archer AXE75 WiFi 6E Router
shortDescription: Tri-band WiFi 6E router with 6GHz band for fast home networks.
description: The TP-Link Archer AXE75 brings WiFi 6E to your home with a dedicated 6GHz band. Tri-band design with 5400Mbps total throughput covers large homes with ease.

name: Seagate IronWolf 8TB NAS HDD
shortDescription: 8TB NAS hard drive built for 24/7 multi-bay systems.
description: The Seagate IronWolf 8TB is purpose-built for NAS systems with AgileArray technology. 24/7 operation rated, IronWolf Health Management, and 3-year Rescue Data Recovery.

name: Brother HL-L2350DW Laser Printer
shortDescription: Compact wireless mono laser printer with auto-duplex.
description: The Brother HL-L2350DW is a compact mono laser printer with wireless connectivity and automatic duplex printing. Cost-effective toner and reliable printing for home offices.
